rationale: Fam. Code §264.0111 governs money earned by children in DFPS-managed conservatorship. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A child for whom the department has been appointed managing conservator and who has been placed by the department in a residential child-care facility as defined by Chapter 42, Human Resources Code, is entitled to keep any money earned by the child during the time of the child's placement.
_note: No overlap between proposed Tax Code homestead exemption change and this Family Code provision.
